questions: Find datasets that have no functional MRI datatype.
Find datasets that have no functional MRI datatypes.
near_dup_candidates.sql_a: SELECT d.id, d.name, d.accession_id, d.bids_version, d.dataset_type, d.source_type, d.remote_url, d.validation_status, COUNT(DISTINCT o.subject) AS subject_count FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.datatype = 'func' THEN o.id END) = 0
near_dup_candidates.sql_b: SELECT d.id, d.name, d.accession_id, d.bids_version, d.dataset_type, d.source_type, d.remote_url, d.validation_status, COUNT(DISTINCT o.subject) AS subject_count FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bids_objects bo WHERE bo.dataset_id = d.id AND bo.datatype = 'func') GROUP BY d.id LIMIT 50

near_dup_candidates.sql_b: SELECT d.id, d.name, d.accession_id, d.bids_version, d.dataset_type, d.source_type, d.remote_url, d.validation_status, COUNT(DISTINCT o.subject) AS subject_count FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bids_objects bo WHERE bo.dataset_id = d.id AND bo.session IS NOT NULL GROUP BY bo.dataset_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT bo.session) >= 3) GROUP BY d.id ORDER BY subject_count DESC LIMIT 5
